title: Viral illness follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.
presenting_history.rationale: Relevant only to a clinician-established uncomplicated common-cold context.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold

red_flags.text: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.
red_flags.rationale: Preserves telehealth and presentation limits rather than generalizing to every viral illness.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold

red_flags.text: Lists respiratory, swallowing, neurologic, rash, and pediatric breathing concerns that require assessment or escalation.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded concern features without automatically classifying urgency.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists respiratory, swallowing, neurologic, rash, and pediatric breathing concerns that require assessment or escalation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Virus or syndrome, onset, prior assessment, symptoms, exposures, tests, age, pregnancy, immune status and function are absent.
No viral diagnosis, recovery, infectiousness, test, treatment, return date or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
